product.title: ForgeTorque Pro 3000 — Professional Torque Wrench
product.body_html:
The ForgeTorque Pro 3000 detects calibration drift before it causes a failure. ±0.5% accuracy across the full torque range, independently verified to ISO 6789-2:2017. IP68, ATEX certified for explosive atmospheres. Used by Tier-1 aerospace OEMs and 4,000+ MRO facilities worldwide.

Real-time drift alerts. Bluetooth sync to maintenance systems. Auto-shutdown memory for 50 readings. 3-year calibration warranty.

metafields.value: ForgeTorque Pro 3000 — Real-Time Torque Calibration Tool
±0.5% torque accuracy with live calibration drift detection. independently verified, ATEX certified, used by aerospace OEMs and 4,000+ MRO facilities. Request a demo.
